ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature and its functionality */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the feature (e.g., Now, Upcoming, Never) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  "implementation_timeline" TEXT /* Description of the feature's implementation timeline */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the feature (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Now, Upcoming, Never) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., update, repair) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details regarding the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_result" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance result (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "next_scheduled_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Status before the update */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* Status after the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_updates_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator, support) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission (e.g., access features, modify records) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the feature belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_category_mapping_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feature_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_comments_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature to which the attachment belongs */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., pdf, docx) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_attachments_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)
